name: Meatless Chili and Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Place elbow macaroni in a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Cover with hot tap water.
3. Microwave at high for 5-6 minutes, then reduce power to medium and microwave for another 6 minutes. Set aside until the macaroni is al dente. Drain any excess liquid.
4. Alternatively, cook the macaroni on the stovetop according to package directions (usually about 8 minutes).
5. Add the remaining ingredients except cheese to the cooked pasta in the casserole dish.
6. Cover with a lid or plastic wrap and microwave at high for 10 minutes, then reduce power to medium and continue cooking for another 10 minutes. Alternatively, stir over low heat on the stovetop until heated through.
7. Sprinkle with cheese and let stand until melted.
Each serving contains approximately 1 cup (241 calories, 32g carbohydrates, 12g protein, 7g fat), 1 starch choice, 1 protein choice, 1 milk choice, 1 fruit/vegetable choice.
